content.full_text:
December 11, 2003

Carla B. Chokel
1850 Turk Street, #301
San Francisco, CA 94115

Re: Our File No. W-03-192

Dear Ms. Chokel:

Pursuant to your written communication of November 20, 2003, the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your August 21, 2003, request for written advice. As you have elected not to pursue employment outside state service, you no longer require written advice regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act.1

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

By: Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

LM:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appears at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
